embassy_hk.name_en: Hong Kong Economic and Trade Office, Tokyo
embassy_hk.address_en: Hong Kong Economic and Trade Office Bldg, 30-1 Sanban-Cho, Chiyoda-ku, Tokyo 102-0075, Japan

power.note: Eastern Japan (including Tokyo) operates on 50Hz, while Western Japan (including Osaka/Kyoto) operates on 60Hz

tipping.note_en: Not customary. Can cause confusion or be perceived as impolite. Service is included in standard pricing.
tipping.note_zh: 不設小費文化。支付小費可能會引起混亂或被視為不禮貌，服務費已包含在基本價格中。

sales_tax.note_en: Standard rate 10%; reduced rate of 8% applied to food/beverages (excluding alcohol and dining out).

tax_refund.how_it_works_en: Instant point-of-sale deduction or same-day in-store tax refund counter. Physical passport with valid entry stamp required.
tips_en: Original physical passport required (no photocopies)
Consumables are sealed in special bags and must remain unopened until departure

visa_caution.summary: HKSAR and BNO passport holders enjoy visa-free entry for tourism up to 90 days. Other passports must check requirements.

pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Generates unified QR codes for immigration and customs declarations. Expedites processing via electronic terminals.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 生成統一的入境及海關二維碼，可使用電子閘機大幅加快過關速度。

embassy_hk.name_en: Consular Section of the Embassy of the People's Republic of China in Seoul
embassy_hk.address_en: 50-7, No.2 Street, Namsan-dong, Chung-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea

tipping.note_en: Not customary; generally not expected in restaurants, hotels, or taxis.
tipping.note_zh: 不設小費文化；在餐廳、酒店或的士一般不需要付小費。

sales_tax.note_en: 10% Value Added Tax (VAT) included in displayed retail prices.

tax_refund.min_purchase_note_en: KRW 15,000 per transaction at participating stores
tax_refund.how_it_works_en: Immediate point-of-sale deduction (passport required) or post-purchase claim via airport kiosks. Net return is typically 4-7% after admin fees.
tax_refund.where_to_claim_en: Store and/or landside airport kiosks before check-in
tips_en: Scan receipts at airport kiosks before checking baggage
Immediate point-of-sale limit is KRW 1,000,000 per receipt (capped at KRW 5,000,000 per trip)
Kiosk will indicate with an 'X' if manual customs inspection of goods is required

visa_caution.summary: K-ETA temporarily exempted for HKSAR/Macau through Dec 31, 2026, but requires e-Arrival Card submission instead.

pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Replaces paper arrival forms. Must be submitted within 72 hours prior to arrival if traveling under K-ETA exemption.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 取代紙本入境卡。若獲豁免K-ETA，必須在抵達前72小時內提交。

pre_arrival_forms.name_zh: 檢疫資訊預先輸入系統 (Q-Code)
pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Required only if arriving from strict quarantine areas or exhibiting symptoms.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 僅限從指定檢疫地區出發或出現病徵的旅客需要填寫。

embassy_hk.name_en: Assistance to Hong Kong Residents Unit (HK Immigration Department)
embassy_hk.address_en: N/A (HKETCO in Taiwan suspended since 2021; use 24-hour hotline)

power.note: Operates on 60Hz frequency, similar to North America

tipping.note_en: Not customary. High-end restaurants auto-levy a 10% service charge; independent eateries and taxis do not expect tips.
tipping.note_zh: 不設小費文化。高級餐廳會自動收取10%服務費，一般小店及的士司機不期望收到小費。

sales_tax.note_en: 5% VAT is embedded within the displayed price.

tax_refund.min_purchase_note_en: NT$2,000 (VAT included) same day at single TRS-labeled store
tax_refund.how_it_works_en: Refunds subject to a 20% administration charge. On-site refunds available for purchases under NT$48,000.
tax_refund.where_to_claim_en: Authorized retail stores or E-VAT kiosks at airport
tips_en: Use E-VAT kiosks prior to luggage check-in
Goods must be exported within 90 days of purchase
Kiosk determines if manual customs inspection is required

visa_caution.summary: HK/Macau passport holders DO NOT have visa-free entry. Must secure Online Entry Permit (Web Notice) prior to travel.

pre_arrival_forms.name_en: Online Entry Permit for Hong Kong and Macao Residents
pre_arrival_forms.name_zh: 港澳居民網路申請入臺證
pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Must print a physical, color copy of the approval notice. Digital presentations on phones are rejected.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 必須列印彩色的實體入臺證，邊境不接受手機展示電子版本。

pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Fully replaces paper cards as of Oct 1, 2025. Must be submitted within 7 days prior to arrival.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 自2025年10月起全面取代紙本入境表。必須在抵達前7天內提交。

embassy_hk.name_en: Hong Kong Economic and Trade Office, Bangkok
embassy_hk.address_en: 21st Floor, Sathorn Square, 98 North Sathorn Road, Silom, Bangrak, Bangkok 10500, Thailand

dive_emergency.nearest_hyperbaric_note_en: Multi-place hyperbaric chambers located in Phuket (Bangkok Hospital Siriroj), Koh Samui (Bophut), and Koh Tao (Mae Haad, 24/7).

power.note: Operates on 50Hz. Multi-socket receptacles are common and accommodate many plug types, including local Type O.

tipping.note_en: Not strictly customary but appreciated in tourist zones (e.g., rounding up taxi fares, 20-50 THB for massage/porters).
tipping.note_zh: 非強制性，但在旅遊區普遍受歡迎（如的士車資整數找續，給按摩師或行李員20-50泰銖）。

sales_tax.note_en: Hotels and upmarket restaurants frequently display prices exclusive of VAT; a 10% service charge and 7% VAT are added to the final bill.

tax_refund.how_it_works_en: Requires meticulous procedural compliance. Cumulative total of refund forms must equal/exceed THB 5,000.
tax_refund.where_to_claim_en: Airport Customs (pre check-in) then Revenue office (post-immigration)
tips_en: Must request P.P.10 form and original tax invoice at time of purchase with physical passport
Goods and P.P.10 forms MUST be stamped by Customs BEFORE luggage check-in
Luxury goods over THB 10,000 must be hand-carried and presented to Revenue officers after immigration clearance

visa_caution.summary: HKSAR passport holders generally benefit from visa-free entry for tourism (30-60 days depending on current decrees). Strict 6-month passport validity required.

pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Replaced TM6 paper forms on May 1, 2025. Captures itinerary, accommodation, and health data. Must submit within 72 hours prior to arrival.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 2025年5月1日起取代紙本TM6表格。必須在抵達前72小時內提交。

embassy_hk.name_en: Hong Kong Economic and Trade Office, Singapore

tipping.note_en: Wholly redundant, not expected, and occasionally discouraged due to the automatic 10% service charge.
tipping.note_zh: 完全不需要且不被期望，部分場所甚至不鼓勵給予小費，因已自動收取10%服務費。

sales_tax.note_en: Prices inclusive of 9% GST. F&B outlets with a service charge may display base prices, appending 10% service and 9% GST at billing.

tax_refund.min_purchase_note_en: SGD 100 (including GST). Up to 3 same-day receipts from a single GST-registered retailer can be aggregated.
tax_refund.how_it_works_en: Frictionless paperless system. Present physical passport at point of sale to digitally link eTRS transaction to your passport profile.
tips_en: Use Departure Hall (landside) kiosks for items in checked baggage
Use Transit Lounge (airside) kiosks for hand-carried items
Goods must be exported by air within two months of purchase; traveler must depart within 12 hours of kiosk approval

visa_caution.summary: HKSAR and BNO passport holders granted visa-free entry for up to 30 days. Passport must have 6 months validity.

pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Absolute mandate for all arrivals. Enables seamless use of automated biometric clearance gates at Changi Airport.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 所有旅客必須填寫，填妥後可於樟宜機場無縫使用自動生物識別過關閘機。

embassy_hk.name_en: Hong Kong Economic and Trade Office, Kuala Lumpur
embassy_hk.address_en: Room 771, Level 7, Tribeca Bukit Bintang, No. 215, Jalan Imbi, 55100 Kuala Lumpur

dive_emergency.nearest_hyperbaric_note_en: Military-operated chambers in Sabah (KD Sri Semporna and Naval Base Sepangar in Kota Kinabalu).

tipping.note_en: Not customary. A standard 10% service charge is automatically levied in most venues. Small change for exceptional service is appreciated.

sales_tax.note_en: 8% Sales and Service Tax (SST). Frequently applied alongside a 10% service charge ('++' pricing).

tax_refund.how_it_works_en: No VAT/GST refund mechanism currently exists following the 2018 tax reforms.

visa_caution.summary: HKSAR passport holders generally enjoy visa-free access for short leisure stays, but rules frequently adapt. Verify prior to travel.

pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Must be submitted within 3 days (72 hours) prior to arrival. HKSAR passports are not exempt.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 抵達前3天（72小時）內必須提交。特區護照持有人不能豁免。

embassy_hk.address_en: 46 Hoang Dieu Road, Ba Dinh District, Hanoi

dive_emergency.nearest_hyperbaric_note_en: Dedicated facilities exceedingly rare. Limited capability at Vinmec Nha Trang; severe cases require evacuation to Singapore or Thailand.

power.note: A mix of flat and round two-pin plugs are used. 50Hz.

tipping.note_en: Not culturally expected, but a 5-10% tip or rounding up the fare is highly appreciated due to low baseline wages.

sales_tax.note_en: Temporarily reduced from 10% to 8% for most eligible goods through Dec 31, 2026.

tax_refund.min_purchase_note_en: Minimum 2,000,000 VND per store per day.
tax_refund.how_it_works_en: Reclaim 85% of VAT paid (net effective ~6.8%). Must present physical passport at purchase. Unused goods must be inspected at airport customs prior to checking luggage.
tax_refund.where_to_claim_en: Customs Inspection Counter (before check-in) -> Refund Counter (post-immigration).
tips_en: Shop at 'VAT Refund for Tourists' authorized retailers
Do not check baggage containing refund items before customs inspection

visa_caution.summary: HKSAR passport holders must secure a visa prior to travel, typically via the official e-Visa portal.

pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Effective April 2026 for SGN (Ho Chi Minh City). Generates QR code. Strictly 72-hour window.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 自2026年4月起適用於胡志明市（SGN）。抵達前72小時內填寫。

embassy_hk.name_en: Hong Kong Economic and Trade Office, Jakarta
embassy_hk.address_en: 19th Floor, World Trade Centre 2, Jalan Jenderal Sudirman Kav. 29-31, Jakarta Selatan

dive_emergency.nearest_hyperbaric_note_en: Bali: Sanglah General (Denpasar) & Kasih Ibu (Gianyar). Raja Ampat/Sorong: Severely limited; complex aero-evac to Bali/Singapore likely required.

tipping.note_en: Culturally welcomed in tourist epicenters like Bali, even when a service charge is included. Round up taxi fares.

sales_tax.note_en: 12% VAT (PPN) effective Jan 2025. Hospitality often uses '++' pricing (~21-22% markup for tax + service charge).

tax_refund.min_purchase_note_en: Min VAT IDR 50,000 per receipt, accumulated to at least IDR 500,000 in VAT (approx IDR 4,166,000 pre-tax spend).
tax_refund.how_it_works_en: Digital process via VAT Refund app. Refunds < IDR 5,000,000 in cash at airport; larger amounts via bank transfer. Must export goods within 30 days.
tax_refund.where_to_claim_en: Airport Tax Refund Counter via DJP App
tips_en: Download official VAT Refund App
Look for 'Tax Refund for Tourists' logo

visa_caution.summary: HKSAR passport holders require a Visa on Arrival (VoA) or pre-arrival e-VoA for tourism.

pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Unified digital gateway replacing e-CD and SATUSEHAT. Complete 72 hours prior.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 統一的電子入境、海關及健康申報。抵達前72小時內填寫。

pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: IDR 150,000 mandatory levy per person entering Bali. Pay pre-arrival to avoid queues. Beware of scam domains.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 進入峇里島每人需繳交150,000印尼盾。強烈建議抵達前網上支付。

embassy_hk.address_en: H. Nookurikeela, Dhunbugas Magu, Henveiru, Malé

dive_emergency.nearest_hyperbaric_note_en: Primary facility at ADK Hospital (Malé). Regional resort chambers at Bandos (North Malé), Kuramathi (Rasdhoo), and Kandima (Dhaalu).

power.note: Type G is most common in resorts, but some older setups use Type D. 50Hz.

tipping.note_en: 10% service charge is universally applied to bills. However, leaving extra cash gratuities for dedicated staff (room attendants, butlers, dive guides) is highly expected.

sales_tax.note_en: 16% Tourism Goods and Services Tax (TGST) applied to all resort and tourism purchases.

tax_refund.how_it_works_en: The Maldives does not operate a tourist tax refund scheme. Taxes paid are final.

visa_caution.summary: Universal 30-day visa-free entry for all nationalities, provided you have a valid passport, resort booking, and return ticket.

pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Must be submitted within 96 hours prior to flight time. Entirely free of charge; avoid third-party scam sites charging fees.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 航班起飛前96小時內提交。完全免費，請提防收取手續費的詐騙網站。

embassy_hk.name_en: Hong Kong Economic and Trade Office, Sydney
embassy_hk.address_en: Level 1, Hong Kong House, 80 Druitt Street, Sydney, NSW 2000, Australia

dive_emergency.nearest_hyperbaric_note_en: Townsville University Hospital (for Great Barrier Reef) and major capital hospitals including Prince of Wales Hospital (Sydney) and The Alfred (Melbourne).

power.note: 50Hz frequency; same plug standard as New Zealand

tipping.note_en: Not customary in Australia. Leaving a 10% tip for exceptional table service at high-end restaurants is appreciated but entirely optional.
tipping.note_zh: 澳洲不設小費文化。在高級餐廳若服務極佳可給予約10%作鼓勵，但非強制；的士及酒吧亦不需要小費。

sales_tax.note_en: 10% Goods and Services Tax (GST) is included in all displayed retail prices by law.

tax_refund.min_purchase_note_en: Spend AUD 300+ (GST inclusive) at a single business with the same ABN within 60 days of departure
tax_refund.how_it_works_en: Purchase eligible goods, obtain a valid paper tax invoice, and carry them in hand luggage (or have them sighted by ABF before checking in) to claim at the airport TRS facility on departure.
tax_refund.where_to_claim_en: TRS Facility at international airport departure area (after customs/passport control).
tips_en: Passport name must match invoice for purchases of AUD 1,000 or more
Must purchase within 60 days of departure
Get a valid paper tax invoice in English
Use the TRS mobile app to pre-fill info and generate a QR code to speed up lines
Declare any goods brought back to Australia for which you claimed a refund

visa_caution.summary: Hong Kong (HKSAR/BNO) passport holders need an Electronic Travel Authority (ETA) applied through the official 'AustralianETA' mobile app prior to travel. Others must verify visa requirements.

pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Must be applied via the official 'AustralianETA' mobile app. AUD 20 processing fee applies.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 必須透過官方手機應用程式「AustralianETA」申請。需支付20澳元服務費。

pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Digital alternative to paper Incoming Passenger Card, currently in pilot phase for select Qantas flights to SYD, BNE, and MEL.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 紙本入境卡的電子替代方案，目前僅限乘搭指定澳航航班前往悉尼、布里斯班和墨爾本的旅客在Qantas App內填寫。

embassy_hk.name_en: Hong Kong Economic and Trade Office, Sydney (covers New Zealand)
embassy_hk.address_en: Level 1, Hong Kong House, 80 Druitt Street, Sydney, NSW 2000, Australia

power.note: 50Hz frequency; same plug standard as Australia

tipping.note_en: Tipping is not customary in New Zealand. Wages are covered by local laws, and service is included in the price.
tipping.note_zh: 新西蘭不設小費文化。服務人員薪金受當地法律保障，任何場所均無須支付小費。

sales_tax.note_en: 15% Goods and Services Tax (GST) is legally included in all advertised retail prices.

tax_refund.how_it_works_en: New Zealand does not have a post-purchase GST refund scheme. To shop GST-free, you must buy from downtown duty-free stores and collect at airport departure gates, or have the store ship items directly overseas.
tips_en: No GST refund desks exist at airports for general retail purchases
Downtown duty-free shops allow zero-GST purchase if collected at the airport gates

visa_caution.summary: Hong Kong (HKSAR/BNO) passport holders can travel visa-waiver for up to 3 months but MUST obtain an NZeTA (New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority) online before departure.

pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Must be acquired before departure. Mobile app costs NZD 17, web NZD 23. A NZD 35 International Visitor Conservation and Tourism Levy (IVL) is also charged.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 出發前必須取得。透過手機App申請（17紐元）較網頁版（23紐元）便宜。另需支付35紐元的國際旅客保育及旅遊稅 (IVL)。

pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Submit online or via the NZTD app within 24 hours of starting your journey to New Zealand. Replaces physical paper arrival card.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 可在開始前往新西蘭旅程前24小時內，透過網頁或NZTD手機應用程式提交。已取代紙本入境申報卡。

embassy_hk.name_en: Hong Kong Economic and Trade Office, Washington, D.C.

tipping.note_en: Highly customary and expected. 15-20% is standard for table service, taxis, and bartenders. USD 1-2 per bag for porters and USD 2-5 per night for housekeeping.
tipping.note_zh: 非常重要且屬常規。堂食服務、的士及酒吧標準小費為稅前總額的15%至20%。行李搬運員每件行李1-2美元，酒店客房清潔每天2-5美元。

regions.name: California
regions.caveats: Minimum statewide rate. Local city and county taxes push the total combined rate up to 10.75% (e.g., Los Angeles can be 9.5%).

regions.name: New York
regions.caveats: State rate. Combined with local county/city sales taxes, the rate is typically 8% to 8.875% (New York City is 8.875%).

regions.name: Florida
regions.caveats: State rate. Combined state and local discretionary sales surtaxes can reach up to 8%.

regions.name: Nevada
regions.caveats: Minimum statewide combined rate. Combined state and local county sales taxes can reach up to 8.375% (e.g., Las Vegas is 8.375%).

regions.name: Hawaii
regions.caveats: General Excise Tax (GET) rate. Combined with county surcharges, it reaches 4.5% on Oahu and is passed on to consumers.

sales_tax.note_en: Sales tax is never included in the sticker price; it is added at checkout. Rates vary heavily by state, county, and city. Five states (OR, MT, NH, DE, AK) have no state sales tax.

tax_refund.min_purchase_note_en: No federal tax refund scheme available
tax_refund.how_it_works_en: The United States does not have a national sales tax or a federal tourist refund scheme. However, Texas and Louisiana offer state-level sales tax refunds for international visitors through designated brokers.
tax_refund.where_to_claim_en: Texas TaxFree Shopping kiosks at major airports/malls; Louisiana Tax Free Shopping redemption centers.
tips_en: No national or federal sales tax refund program exists
Texas state refund requires physical goods, original paper receipts, passport, I-94/ESTA, and an international flight itinerary
Texas requires a minimum of USD 10 in tax per store

visa_caution.summary: HKSAR and BNO passport holders are NOT eligible for the Visa Waiver Program (ESTA) and MUST obtain a physical B1/B2 tourist visa in advance from a US Consulate.

pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Only applicable to tourists entering under the Visa Waiver Program (VWP). HKSAR/BNO passport holders are NOT eligible and must apply for a B1/B2 visa. USD 21 fee.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 僅適用於免簽證計劃 (VWP) 國籍之護照。特區護照及BNO持有人不適用，必須預先申請實體簽證。費用為21美元。

pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Free CBP mobile app that allows eligible travelers (like those with an approved ESTA) to submit passport and declaration info digitally to access an express lane at major US airports.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 美國海關及邊境保護局的免費應用程式，允許符合資格的旅客（如持有已獲批ESTA者）提前提交資料，以使用機場特快通道。

embassy_hk.name_en: Hong Kong Economic and Trade Office, Toronto
embassy_hk.address_en: 174 St. George Street, Toronto, Ontario, M5R 2M7, Canada

power.note: 60Hz frequency, identical to the United States.

tipping.note_en: Highly customary and expected. 15-20% is standard for sit-down restaurants, bar service, and taxis. Housekeeping and porters are also typically tipped CAD 2-5.
tipping.note_zh: 普遍預期且屬慣例。堂食服務、的士及酒吧標準小費為稅前總額的15%至20%。酒店清潔人員及行李搬運服務亦建議給予2至5加元小費。

regions.name: British Columbia
regions.caveats: Consists of 5% federal GST and 7% Provincial Sales Tax (PST) shown as separate lines on receipt.

regions.name: Ontario
regions.caveats: 13% Harmonized Sales Tax (HST) which blends federal GST and provincial sales tax into one combined tax rate.

regions.name: Quebec
regions.caveats: Consists of 5% federal GST and 9.975% Quebec Sales Tax (QST).

regions.name: Alberta
regions.caveats: Charges 5% federal GST only. No provincial sales tax.

sales_tax.note_en: Federal GST of 5% applies nationwide. Provinces add Provincial Sales Tax (PST/QST) or combine them into a Harmonized Sales Tax (HST) ranging from 5% to 15% total.

tax_refund.how_it_works_en: Canada abolished its Visitor Rebate Program. Currently, there is no tax refund scheme for international tourists on retail purchases or accommodation.
tips_en: No GST/HST refund options exist at Canadian airports
All retail consumption taxes paid are final for international visitors

visa_caution.summary: Hong Kong (HKSAR/BNO) passport holders can travel visa-exempt but MUST obtain an Electronic Travel Authorization (eTA) online before departure by air.

pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Required for visa-exempt foreign nationals (including HKSAR and BNO passports) flying to Canada. Valid for 5 years or until passport expires. CAD 7 fee applies.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 免簽證外籍旅客（包括特區護照及BNO持有人）乘搭飛機前往加拿大必須持有。有效期為5年或至護照失效為止。費用為7加元。

pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Optional but highly recommended digital tool to submit customs and immigration declarations up to 72 hours in advance to use fast-track express lanes at major Canadian airports.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 可選但強烈推薦的工具。可在抵達前72小時內提前提交海關和入境申報，以在加拿大主要機場使用快速通道。

embassy_hk.name_en: Hong Kong Economic and Trade Office, London
embassy_hk.address_en: 18 Bedford Square, London WC1B 3JA, United Kingdom

tipping.note_en: 10-15% expected if a 'discretionary service charge' is not already added to the bill.
tipping.note_zh: 如果帳單未自動加入「酌情服務費」(discretionary service charge)，通常需支付10-15%的小費。

sales_tax.note_en: VAT is included in the displayed retail prices.

tax_refund.how_it_works_en: Tax-free shopping for tourists taking items in luggage was abolished on Jan 1, 2021.
tips_en: No longer available for leisure tourists carrying goods home.

visa_caution.summary: HKSAR passport holders are visa-exempt for short visits, but require an ETA. Check specific rules.

pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Mandatory for HKSAR passport holders. Valid for 2 years. Applies to all ages including infants.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 香港特區護照持有人必須申請。有效期2年，所有年齡（包括嬰兒）均需單獨申請。

embassy_hk.name_en: Hong Kong Economic and Trade Office, Brussels (Covers Ireland)

power.note: Same 3-pin rectangular plugs as the UK

tipping.note_en: 10-15% customary in restaurants if a service charge is not included. Not expected at pubs for drinks.
tipping.note_zh: 在餐廳若未收取服務費，通常支付10-15%小費。在酒吧點酒水通常無需給小費。

sales_tax.note_en: Standard VAT rate of 23% is included in retail prices.

tax_refund.how_it_works_en: Request tax-free form in store; validate at Customs or self-service drop box at the airport.
tax_refund.where_to_claim_en: Airport customs desk or designated drop boxes before departure
tips_en: Ensure goods remain unused and accessible for inspection
Net return is usually 11-15% after admin fees

visa_caution.summary: HKSAR passport holders do not need a visa or ETA for Ireland, but transiting the UK requires a UK ETA.

embassy_hk.name_en: Hong Kong Economic and Trade Office, Brussels (Covers France)

power.note: Europlug (C) or French plug with grounding pin (E)

tipping.note_en: Service is legally included ('service compris'). Tipping is not expected; leaving small change is optional.
tipping.note_zh: 法律規定帳單已包含服務費（Service compris）。無需按比例支付小費，留下少許零錢僅為額外心意。

sales_tax.note_en: VAT (TVA) of 20% included in listed prices.

tax_refund.min_purchase_note_en: €100.01 minimum; can aggregate receipts using digital apps
tax_refund.how_it_works_en: Scan tax-free forms at PABLO kiosks at the airport before security.
tax_refund.where_to_claim_en: PABLO self-service kiosks at CDG and other major exit points
tips_en: Green screen on PABLO means validation successful without customs officer
Goods must be exported within 3 months

visa_caution.summary: HKSAR passport holders currently enjoy 90-day visa-free access, but ETIAS will eventually be required.

pre_arrival_forms.name_en: European Travel Information and Authorisation System (ETIAS)
pre_arrival_forms.name_zh: 歐洲旅行信息和授權系統 (ETIAS)
pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Deployment delayed to 2027 due to EES technical issues. Currently not enforced for HKSAR citizens.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 由於技術延遲，預計推遲至2027年實施。目前對香港特區護照持有人尚未強制執行。

embassy_hk.name_en: Hong Kong Economic and Trade Office, Brussels (Covers Italy)

power.note: Type L (three pins in a row) is standard, but Type C/F common

tipping.note_en: A fixed cover charge ('coperto', €2-€5) is applied automatically. Percentage tipping is not expected.
tipping.note_zh: 餐廳入座後通常會自動收取固定座位費（Coperto，約2至5歐元）。無需按比例支付小費。

sales_tax.note_en: VAT (IVA) of 22% included in listed prices.

tax_refund.how_it_works_en: Retailer issues digital invoice via OTELLO using your passport. Validate at OTELLO kiosks/desks at airport.
tax_refund.where_to_claim_en: Airport refund operator desks or customs digital kiosks
tips_en: Unique validation allows single scan for multiple invoices under one passport
Proof of export deadline extended to 6 months

visa_caution.summary: HKSAR passport holders currently enjoy 90-day visa-free access, but ETIAS will eventually be required.

pre_arrival_forms.name_en: European Travel Information and Authorisation System (ETIAS)
pre_arrival_forms.name_zh: 歐洲旅行信息和授權系統 (ETIAS)
pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Deployment delayed to 2027 due to EES technical issues. Currently not enforced for HKSAR citizens.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 由於技術延遲，預計推遲至2027年實施。目前對香港特區護照持有人尚未強制執行。

embassy_hk.name_en: Hong Kong Economic and Trade Office, Berlin (Covers Switzerland)

power.note: Type J (three pins) is standard; Type C often works.

tipping.note_en: Service charge legally included. Tipping 15-20% is highly unusual; rounding up the bill is a common courtesy.
tipping.note_zh: 法律規定帳單已包含服務費。高額小費非常罕見，通常只需將帳單金額向上取整數即可。

sales_tax.note_en: Standard VAT (MWST/TVA) is 8.1% (increasing to 8.8% in 2028), included in prices.

tax_refund.how_it_works_en: Process form at Swiss airport customs, or MUST obtain physical Swiss customs stamp at border before exiting by land/rail.
tax_refund.where_to_claim_en: Swiss airports or land border crossing checkpoints prior to exiting Switzerland
tips_en: CRITICAL: If leaving via train/car into the EU, get a Swiss customs stamp before crossing. EU customs cannot validate Swiss goods.
Net return is only 4-6%

visa_caution.summary: HKSAR passport holders currently enjoy 90-day visa-free access, but ETIAS will eventually be required.

pre_arrival_forms.name_en: European Travel Information and Authorisation System (ETIAS)
pre_arrival_forms.name_zh: 歐洲旅行信息和授權系統 (ETIAS)
pre_arrival_forms.notes_en: Deployment delayed to 2027 due to EES technical issues. Currently not enforced for HKSAR citizens.
pre_arrival_forms.notes_zh: 由於技術延遲，預計推遲至2027年實施。目前對香港特區護照持有人尚未強制執行。

airports.name: Tokyo Haneda
airports.typical_transport_en: Tokyo Monorail + JR or Keikyu Line
airports.assumptions_en: From Tokyo Station area via public transport; not live traffic; excludes peak hour congestion and baggage retrieval times

airports.name: Tokyo Narita
airports.typical_transport_en: JR Narita Express (N'EX) or Keisei Skyliner
airports.assumptions_en: From Tokyo Station area via express rail; excludes live traffic and internal station navigation times

airports.name: Seoul Incheon
airports.assumptions_en: From Seoul Station via direct express rail; not live traffic; avoids road congestion

airports.name: Taipei Taoyuan
airports.assumptions_en: From Taipei Main Station via Express train service; not live traffic; avoids heavy expressway traffic

airports.name: Bangkok Suvarnabhumi
airports.assumptions_en: From central nodes like Siam Station via rail network; not live traffic; highly recommended to avoid notorious surface traffic

airports.name: Singapore Changi
airports.typical_transport_en: MRT East-West Line (with transfer at Tanah Merah)
airports.assumptions_en: From urban core via public transport; actual train ride is short but buffer additional time for vast walking distances within Changi terminals

airports.name: Kuala Lumpur International Airport
airports.assumptions_en: 28 minutes reflects pure train transit time from T1 to KL Sentral. Add time for terminal navigation, check-in, and transfer from final hotel to the KL Sentral hub.

airports.name: Tan Son Nhat International Airport
airports.assumptions_en: Varies drastically with traffic. Off-peak can be 20 mins; rush hour (07:00-09:00, 16:30-19:30) can exceed 60 minutes. 3-hour airport buffer advised due to immigration queues.

airports.name: I Gusti Ngurah Rai International Airport
airports.typical_transport_en: Pre-booked Private Transfer or Official Taxi
airports.assumptions_en: Assumes journey to Seminyak. Highly volatile traffic corridor; peak afternoon/evening travel (16:00-19:00) routinely extends trips to 75+ minutes.

airports.name: Velana International Airport
airports.typical_transport_en: Taxi (via Sinamalé Bridge) or Airport Express Ferry
airports.assumptions_en: Transit time strictly reflects travel from the airport island (Hulhulé) to Malé City. Does NOT account for lengthy, complex seaplane or speedboat transfers to private resort atolls.

airports.name: Sydney Kingsford Smith Airport
airports.assumptions_en: From Sydney Central Station via the direct T8 Airport Link train; does not account for peak rail disruptions, security queues, or heavy luggage transit time.

airports.name: Auckland Airport
airports.assumptions_en: From SkyCity Bus Terminal (Hobson Street) via the non-stop SkyDrive Express bus; highly subject to traffic conditions on the Southern Motorway during rush hours.

airports.name: John F. Kennedy International Airport
airports.typical_transport_en: AirTrain JFK + LIRR (Long Island Rail Road)
airports.assumptions_en: From Penn Station via LIRR to Jamaica Station, transferring to the AirTrain JFK; does not account for terminal walking distances, check-in, or track transfer wait times.

airports.name: Vancouver International Airport
airports.assumptions_en: From Waterfront Station via the direct Canada Line rapid transit; immune to road traffic, highly reliable. Does not include walking time inside terminals.

airports.name: London Heathrow
airports.assumptions_en: Non-stop from Terminals 2 & 3; add 6 mins for Terminal 5. Does not account for ticketing or walking time.

airports.name: Dublin Airport
airports.assumptions_en: Coach transit time assumes optimal conditions via Dublin Port Tunnel; highly susceptible to peak-hour traffic congestion.

airports.name: Paris Charles de Gaulle
airports.assumptions_en: Direct public rail transit; not live traffic. Travelers should monitor for frequent track maintenance and pickpockets.

airports.name: Rome Fiumicino
airports.assumptions_en: Non-stop dedicated rail; immune to regular traffic and generally bypasses local transport strikes.

airports.name: Zurich Airport
airports.assumptions_en: Subterranean rail transit from airport station; runs highly frequently. Time averages 9-11 minutes.
